page_metadata.biotools__summary: This tool was primarily intended as a tool for mass spectrometric analysis of proteins and peptides. However, a number of other bioinformatics tools have been included, so the use of the program extends far beyond simple mass analysis.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: This tool was primarily intended as a tool for mass spectrometric analysis of proteins and peptides. However, a number of other bioinformatics tools have been included, so the use of the program extends far beyond simple mass analysis.
